title: Collaborative Research and Concept Definition for OMNIX Dev Tool
goal: Read referenced libraries step-by-step, discuss features to borrow, and establish a final implementation plan.
acceptance_criteria: Read all libraries provided by the user step-by-step
Identify key architecture, design, and functional concepts to adapt
Define name and branding for the OMNIX dev tool
Create a detailed final implementation plan approved by the user
Establish and populate the CHANGELOG.md file in the workspace
risk_analysis: Scope creep: mitigated by structuring the research in steps and defining a strict goal
Direct name/code contamination: resolved by abstracting concepts and rewriting all code cleanly under OMNIX guidelines
planned_actions: Propose name candidates for the OMNIX tool
Define collaborative protocol for reading user-provided libraries
Wait for user to provide the first library
